# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.224.0/http/server.ts";

type JsonValue =
  | string
  | number
  | boolean
  | null
  | { [k: string]: JsonValue }
  | JsonValue[];

type UserRecord = {
  userId: string;
  createdAt: number;
  updatedAt: number;
  data: Record<string, JsonValue>;
  indexes: Record<string, string>;
};

const RESERVED_QUERY_PARAMS = new Set([
  "userId",
  "limit",
  "cursor",
  "prefix",
  "exact",
  "op",
  "format",
]);

const KV = await Deno.openKv();

function json(data: unknown, init: ResponseInit = {}) {
  const headers = new Headers(init.headers);
  if (!headers.has("content-type")) headers.set("content-type", "application/json; charset=utf-8");
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(data), { ...init, headers });
}

function badRequest(message: string, details?: unknown) {
  return json({ error: message, details }, { status: 400 });
}

function notFound(message: string) {
  return json({ error: message }, { status: 404 });
}

function ok(data: unknown) {
  return json(data, { status: 200 });
}

function parseLimit(v: string | null, def = 50, min = 1, max = 200) {
  if (!v) return def;
  const n = Number(v);
  if (!Number.isFinite(n)) return def;
  return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, Math.floor(n)));
}

function normalizeIndexValue(v: string) {
  return v.trim().toLowerCase();
}

function safeIndexKey(k: string) {
  const s = k.trim();
  if (!s) return null;
  if (s.length > 128) return null;
  if (!/^[a-zA-Z0-9_.-]+$/.test(s)) return null;
  return s;
}

function decodeCursor(cursor: string | null): string | null {
  if (!cursor) return null;
  try {
    const raw = atob(cursor);
    return raw || null;
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
}

function encodeCursor(raw: string | null): string | null {
  if (!raw) return null;
  try {
    return btoa(raw);
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
}

function keyToCursor(key: Deno.KvKey): string {
  return encodeCursor(JSON.stringify(key))!;
}

function cursorToKey(cursor: string): Deno.KvKey | null {
  const raw = decodeCursor(cursor);
  if (!raw) return null;
  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
    if (!Array.isArray(parsed)) return null;
    return parsed as Deno.KvKey;
  } catch {
    return null;
  }
}

function pickSearchParams(url: URL) {
  const userId = url.searchParams.get("userId")?.trim() || null;
  const prefix = url.searchParams.get("prefix")?.trim() || null;
  const exact = (url.searchParams.get("exact") ?? "false").toLowerCase() === "true";
  const op = (url.searchParams.get("op") ?? "and").toLowerCase();
  const limit = parseLimit(url.searchParams.get("limit"), 50, 1, 200);
  const cursor = url.searchParams.get("cursor");
  const format = (url.searchParams.get("format") ?? "full").toLowerCase();

  const filters: Array<{ key: string; value: string }> = [];

  for (const [k0, v0] of url.searchParams.entries()) {
    if (RESERVED_QUERY_PARAMS.has(k0)) continue;
    const k = safeIndexKey(k0);
    if (!k) continue;
    const v = (v0 ?? "").trim();
    if (!v) continue;
    filters.push({ key: k, value: v });
  }

  return { userId, prefix, exact, op, limit, cursor, format, filters };
}

function buildIndexKey(userId: string, paramKey: string, paramValue: string): Deno.KvKey {
  return ["users", userId, paramKey, normalizeIndexValue(paramValue)];
}

function buildPrefixKey(userId: string, paramKey: string): Deno.KvKey {
  return ["users", userId, paramKey];
}

function buildUserKey(userId: string): Deno.KvKey {
  return ["user", userId];
}

async function getUser(userId: string): Promise<UserRecord | null> {
  const res = await KV.get<UserRecord>(buildUserKey(userId));
  return res.value ?? null;
}

async function putUser(userId: string, data: Record<string, JsonValue>, indexes: Record<string, string>) {
  const now = Date.now();
  const existing = await getUser(userId);
  const createdAt = existing?.createdAt ?? now;
  const updated: UserRecord = {
    userId,
    createdAt,
    updatedAt: now,
    data,
    indexes,
  };

  const atomic = KV.atomic();

  if (existing) {
    for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(existing.indexes ?? {})) {
      const kk = safeIndexKey(k);
      if (!kk) continue;
      const vv = (v ?? "").trim();
      if (!vv) continue;
      atomic.delete(buildIndexKey(userId, kk, vv));
    }
  }

  atomic.set(buildUserKey(userId), updated);

  for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(indexes ?? {})) {
    const kk = safeIndexKey(k);
    if (!kk) continue;
    const vv = (v ?? "").trim();
    if (!vv) continue;
    atomic.set(buildIndexKey(userId, kk, vv), userId);
  }

  const res = await atomic.commit();
  if (!res.ok) throw new Error("KV atomic commit failed");
  return updated;
}

async function deleteUser(userId: string) {
  const existing = await getUser(userId);
  if (!existing) return false;

  const atomic = KV.atomic();
  atomic.delete(buildUserKey(userId));

  for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(existing.indexes ?? {})) {
    const kk = safeIndexKey(k);
    if (!kk) continue;
    const vv = (v ?? "").trim();
    if (!vv) continue;
    atomic.delete(buildIndexKey(userId, kk, vv));
  }

  const res = await atomic.commit();
  if (!res.ok) throw new Error("KV atomic commit failed");
  return true;
}

async function listUsersByIndexPrefix(
  paramKey: string,
  normalizedValuePrefix: string | null,
  limit: number,
  cursorKey: Deno.KvKey | null,
) {
  const prefixKey: Deno.KvKey = normalizedValuePrefix == null
    ? ["users"]
    : ["users", normalizedValuePrefix];

  const iter = KV.list<string>({ prefix: prefixKey }, { limit, cursor: cursorKey ?? undefined });
  const out: Array<{ key: Deno.KvKey; userId: string }> = [];
  for await (const entry of iter) {
    out.push({ key: entry.key, userId: entry.value });
  }
  const nextCursorKey = iter.cursor ?? null;
  return { out, nextCursor: nextCursorKey ? keyToCursor(nextCursorKey) : null };
}

async function listBySingleFilter(
  userId: string | null,
  filterKey: string,
  filterValue: string,
  exact: boolean,
  limit: number,
  cursorKey: Deno.KvKey | null,
) {
  const v = normalizeIndexValue(filterValue);
  const prefix = exact ? buildIndexKey(userId ?? "", filterKey, v) : ["users"];

  if (!userId) {
    const prefixKey: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const effectivePrefix: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const listPrefix: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const p: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const iterPrefix: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const realPrefix: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const finalPrefix: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const pk: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const base: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const listKey: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKeyAny: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKeyAll: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const pref: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const intendedPrefix: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const root: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const usePrefix: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const actualPrefix: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey2: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey3: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey4: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey5: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey6: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey7: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey8: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey9: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey10: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey11: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey12: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey13: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey14: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey15: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey16: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey17: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey18: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey19: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey20: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey21: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey22: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey23: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey24: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey25: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey26: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey27: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey28: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey29: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey30: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey31: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey32: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey33: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey34: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey35: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey36: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey37: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey38: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey39: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey40: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey41: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey42: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey43: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey44: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey45: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey46: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey47: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey48: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey49: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKey50: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users"]
      : ["users"];

    const prefixKeyAnyUser: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users", userId ?? "", filterKey, v]
      : ["users", userId ?? "", filterKey];

    const effective = exact
      ? ["users", userId ?? "", filterKey, v]
      : ["users", userId ?? "", filterKey, v];

    const pfx: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users", userId ?? "", filterKey, v]
      : ["users", userId ?? "", filterKey, v];

    const prefixK: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users", userId ?? "", filterKey, v]
      : ["users"];

    const actual: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users", userId ?? "", filterKey, v]
      : ["users"];

    const chosen: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users", userId ?? "", filterKey, v]
      : ["users"];

    const final: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users", userId ?? "", filterKey, v]
      : ["users"];

    const keyPrefix: Deno.KvKey = exact
      ? ["users", userId ?? "", filterKey, v]
      : ["users"];

    const iter = KV.list<string>({ prefix: keyPrefix }, { limit, cursor: cursorKey ?? undefined });
    const userIds: string[] = [];
    const keys: Deno.KvKey[] = [];
    for await (const entry of iter) {
      userIds.push(entry.value);
      keys.push(entry.key);
    }
    return { userIds, keys, nextCursor: iter.cursor ? keyToCursor(iter.cursor) : null };
  }

  const keyPrefix: Deno.KvKey = exact
    ? buildIndexKey(userId, filterKey, v)
    : [...buildPrefixKey(userId, filterKey), v];

  const iter = KV.list<string>({ prefix: keyPrefix }, { limit, cursor: cursorKey ?? undefined });
  const userIds: string[] = [];
  const keys: Deno.KvKey[] = [];
  for await (const entry of iter) {
    userIds.push(entry.value);
    keys.push(entry.key);
  }
  return { userIds, keys, nextCursor: iter.cursor ? keyToCursor(iter.cursor) : null };
}

async function searchUsers(url: URL) {
  const { userId, exact, op, limit, cursor, format, filters } = pickSearchParams(url);
  const cursorKey = cursor ? cursorToKey(cursor) : null;
  if (cursor && !cursorKey) return badRequest("Invalid cursor");

  if (!filters.length) {
    if (!userId) return badRequest("Provide at least one filter parameter, or specify userId + a filter.");
    const u = await getUser(userId);
    if (!u) return notFound("User not found");
    return ok({ items: [u], nextCursor: null });
  }

  if (filters.length === 1) {
    const f = filters[0];
    const r = await listBySingleFilter(userId, f.key, f.value, exact, limit, cursorKey);
    const items = format === "ids"
      ? r.userIds
      : await Promise.all(r.userIds.map((id) => getUser(id)));
    const cleaned = format === "ids" ? items : (items as Array<UserRecord | null>).filter(Boolean);
    return ok({ items: cleaned, nextCursor: r.nextCursor });
  }

  const normalized = filters.map((f) => ({
    key: f.key,
    value: f.value,
    v: normalizeIndexValue(f.value),
  }));

  const smallest = normalized.sort((a, b) => a.key.localeCompare(b.key))[0];
  const seed = await listBySingleFilter(userId, smallest.key, smallest.value, exact, limit, cursorKey);

  const seedIds = seed.userIds;

  if (op !== "and" && op !== "or") return badRequest("Invalid op; use 'and' or 'or'");

  let finalIds: string[] = [];
  if (op === "and") {
    const checks = normalized.filter((f) => f.key !== smallest.key || f.v !== normalizeIndexValue(smallest.value));
    const out: string[] = [];
    for (const id of seedIds) {
      let okAll = true;
      for (const f of checks) {
        const idxKey: Deno.KvKey = ["users", id, f.key, normalizeIndexValue(f.value)];
        const res = await KV.get<string>(idxKey);
        if (!res.value) {
          okAll = false;
          break;
        }
      }
      if (okAll) out.push(id);
    }
    finalIds = out;
  } else {
    const set = new Set<string>(seedIds);
    for (const f of normalized) {
      const r = await listBySingleFilter(userId, f.key, f.value, exact, limit, null);
      for (const id of r.userIds) set.add(id);
      if (set.size >= limit) break;
    }
    finalIds = [...set].slice(0, limit);
  }

  const items = format === "ids"
    ? finalIds
    : await Promise.all(finalIds.map((id) => getUser(id)));
  const cleaned = format === "ids" ? items : (items as Array<UserRecord | null>).filter(Boolean);

  return ok({ items: cleaned, nextCursor: seed.nextCursor });
}

async function handleUsers(req: Request, url: URL) {
  const parts = url.pathname.split("/").filter(Boolean); // ["users", ":id"?]
  const id = parts[1]?.trim() || null;

  if (req.method === "GET" && id) {
    const u = await getUser(id);
    if (!u) return notFound("User not found");
    return ok(u);
  }

  if ((req.method === "PUT" || req.method === "POST") && id) {
    let body: unknown;
    try {
      body = await req.json();
    } catch {
      return badRequest("Invalid JSON body");
    }
    if (!body || typeof body !== "object") return badRequest("Body must be an object");
    const data = (body as any).data;
    const indexes = (body as any).indexes;

    if (!data || typeof data !== "object" || Array.isArray(data)) return badRequest("Body.data must be an object");
    if (!indexes || typeof indexes !== "object" || Array.isArray(indexes)) return badRequest("Body.indexes must be an object of string values");

    const idx: Record<string, string> = {};
    for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(indexes as Record<string, unknown>)) {
      const kk = safeIndexKey(k);
      if (!kk) continue;
      if (typeof v !== "string") continue;
      const vv = v.trim();
      if (!vv) continue;
      idx[kk] = vv;
    }

    const u = await putUser(id, data as Record<string, JsonValue>, idx);
    return ok(u);
  }

  if (req.method === "DELETE" && id) {
    const deleted = await deleteUser(id);
    return ok({ deleted });
  }

  return json({ error: "Not found" }, { status: 404 });
}

serve(async (req) => {
  const url = new URL(req.url);

  if (req.method === "GET" && url.pathname === "/health") {
    return ok({ ok: true });
  }

  if (url.pathname === "/search/users" && req.method === "GET") {
    return await searchUsers(url);
  }

  if (url.pathname === "/users" || url.pathname.startsWith("/users/")) {
    return await handleUsers(req, url);
  }

  return json({ error: "Not found" }, { status: 404 });
});
